content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based strength across sectors today: FMCG (Marico ATH), defense (HAL, GRSE), specialty chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE breakout), auto (M&M), and financials (ABCAPITAL ATH, CHOLAHLDNG) all printing strong moves on results. Global cues constructive (Nasdaq +2%). However, portfolio is already heavily deployed across 11 names — priority is RISK MANAGEMENT (trail SLs on winners) rather than chasing more breakouts on a green tape with stretched intraday extensions.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. SL already at 1035 (above entry, locks in ~5% gain). Trail-gap to CMP is ~2.1% which exceeds 1% floor. Holding SL where it is — no-op MODIFY would be wasted signal, but engine schema requires entry per position; treating this as HOLD with stored levels confirmed. Q4 strong, MOFSL Buy TP 1081 nearly hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Hedge position. SL 121 (-2.5%) is appropriate; no trail trigger yet. MACD bearish but holding 20-SMA. Keep as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. SL already at 1730 (breakeven+, locks in ~1.8%). Trail-gap to CMP = 1.55% > 1% floor — keep here. Strong Q4 (+25% revenue), stock at fresh 52w high. Target 1820 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4525.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Currently SL=entry 4575 (above CMP would be self-stop — checking: 4575 < 4630.40, so SL is BELOW CMP, fine). Tightening SL slightly to 4525 would actually LOOSEN — invalid. Keeping SL at 4575 (entry breakeven). Note: this is a no-op tighten attempt; reverting to HOLD logic — leaving SL at 4575."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL at 6960 is above entry (locks +0.9%). Trail-gap to CMP = 1.26% > 1% floor. Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875bps, near 52w high 7200. Holding for target 7400. No-op confirm."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL 830 below entry (-1%); trail-gap 1.8% > floor. +9.84% intraday but only 0.4x volume — keeping SL where it is, not raising aggressively due to weak volume confirmation. Target 900 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1%. Fresh ATH today on big volume (+170% delivery). SL 363 (-1.6%); trail-gap 1.55% > floor. Q4 PAT +30% YoY. Holding levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 810.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Fresh ATH 843.15 today, intraday faded back. SL 810 (-1.3%); trail-gap 1.5% > floor. Q4 strong, MOFSL TP 950. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL=entry 1259 (-1.6%); trail-gap 1.6% > floor. Post-Q4 +11% upper circuit, but Encora dilution overhang and Q4 PAT boosted by one-time tax reversal. Keeping breakeven SL — won't ride loss on this name."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 2990 (-1.5%); trail-gap 1.45% > floor. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA +61%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1. Defense theme strong. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Gap-up +10.46% post-Q4. SL 795 (-1.5%); trail-gap 1.5% > floor. Q4 EBITDA ATH 46.5% margin. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "SL at 1035 already locks ~5% gain; trail-gap healthy."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Hedge; SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1730.00, "reasoning": "SL at 1730 locks +1.8%; trail-gap 1.55%."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4575.00, "reasoning": "SL=entry; trail-gap 1.2%, slightly tight but tolerable on high-conviction defense name."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry; trail-gap 1.26%."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 830.00, "reasoning": "Low-volume breakout; not raising SL aggressively."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 363.00, "reasoning": "ATH today, holding SL."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 810.00, "reasoning": "ATH faded intraday; SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1259.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL on dilution-overhang name."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2990.00, "reasoning": "Defense theme intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 795.00, "reasoning": "Post-Q4 gap-up; SL adequate."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M (auto leader, M&M Q4 PAT +48.5%, Nuvama TP 3,800), GABRIEL (3x volume auto ancillary), CHOLAHLDNG (board meeting May 8 — binary event, NO new entry per rule 11), BHARATFORG (Q4 results TODAY — binary, no new entry). All breakouts noted but book is already 80% deployed across 11 names; adding more would push past soft cap and concentrate Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS already 3 names). Will reassess tomorrow once intraday extensions cool. HFCL pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 from prior session — should be cancelled (stale).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 80%+ deployed across 11 CNC names. Cluster check: Financial Services has PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS (~25% combined) — at cluster soft-limit, no new financials. Defense has HAL + GRSE (~15%) — at cluster limit. Today's tape is broadly green with multiple post-result gap-ups; the right play is to LET WINNERS RUN with prudent SLs, NOT to chase fresh breakouts. CHOLAHLDNG has binary event (May 8 board) — would have qualified but rule 11 blocks new entry within 3 sessions. BHARATFORG results TODAY — also blocked. Cancelling stale HFCL pending order separately is appropriate but schema doesn't expose CANCEL action here; will let it sit (price moved away, unlikely to fill). Cumulative -53.72% drawdown context: discipline > activity. Today is a hold-and-trail day."
}
